---
title: "topk_accuracy"
generated: true
description: "Top-`k` accuracy: fraction of rows whose top-`k` logits hit the label."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.metrics.classification`](../nitrix-metrics-classification.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:topk_accuracy -->
```python
topk_accuracy(logits: Float[Array, 'N C'], target: Int[Array, 'N'], *, k: int = 1, reduction: Reduction = 'mean') -> Float[Array, ''] | Float[Array, 'N']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:topk_accuracy -->
Top-`k` accuracy: fraction of rows whose top-`k` logits hit the label.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:topk_accuracy -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `logits` | `Float` | `N` × `C` | — | Class scores `(N, C)` (the top-`k` are taken along the class axis). |
| `target` | `Int` | `N` | — | True class indices `(N,)` in `[0, C)`. |
| `k` | `int` | — | `1` | Number of top predictions to consider (static). Default `1`. |
| `reduction` | `Reduction` | — | `'mean'` | `"mean"` (default; the accuracy), `"sum"` (the hit count), or `"none"` (the per-row `0/1` hit). |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `N`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:topk_accuracy -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `N` | observations — time points, subjects, or sampled points |
| `C` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
